Common.description: Strategic Media Advisor is an AI designed to provide strategic media monitoring and public opinion analysis for decision-makers, particularly within government, security, and public relations sectors in the Gulf and broader Arab world.

Footer.description: Innovative AI-driven solutions for media monitoring, legal intelligence, and strategic decision making.

lexcura.title: Lexcura Lawyer: AI Legal Intelligence
lexcura.subtitle: Transforming legal workflows with secure, context-aware AI
lexcura.feature_analysis_desc: Scan and understand thousands of pages of legal precedents in seconds.
lexcura.feature_drafting_desc: Generate high-quality legal drafts based on specific case context.
lexcura.feature_insights_desc: Gain edge in litigation with data-driven outcome predictions.

styling.title: Smart Styling Assistant
styling.subtitle: Personalized fashion intelligence for modern e-commerce
styling.feature_wardrobe_desc: Digitize and organize your style profile with 3D body mapping.
styling.feature_recommendations_desc: Get event-specific outfit ideas tailored to your unique preferences.
styling.feature_inventory_desc: Seamlessly integrate with your favorite retailers for real-time availability.
